groups.name: spring.ai.model
groups.description: Shared Yandex Foundation Models settings: API base URL, folder, HTTP client, and path prefix for long-running operations.

groups.name: spring.ai.auth.yandexai
groups.description: Yandex AI authentication: API key or IAM token (static or loaded from a file).

groups.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai
groups.description: Yandex AI chat model: completion model, method path, generation options, and optional dedicated HTTP client settings.

groups.name: spring.ai.model.embedding.yandexai
groups.description: Yandex AI embeddings: method path, document metadata mode, and vector dimension.

groups.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai
groups.description: Yandex AI image generation (async + operation polling): path, aspect ratio, MIME type.

properties.name: spring.ai.auth
properties.description: Spring AI authentication provider. Value "yandexai" registers the AuthorizationProcessor bean from the Yandex AI module.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat
properties.description: Chat model implementation. Value "yandexai" enables YandexAiChatApi and YandexAiChatModel.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.embedding
properties.description: Embedding model implementation. Value "yandexai" enables YandexAiEmbeddingApi and YandexAiEmbeddingModel.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image
properties.description: Image model implementation. Value "yandexai" enables YandexAiImageApi, OperationService, and YandexAiImageModel.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.folder-id
properties.description: Yandex Cloud folder ID shared by all models unless overridden under chat, embedding, or image.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.base-url
properties.description: Base HTTP URL for the LLM API (host and optional path prefix). Used for completion, embeddings, and image calls.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.operation-path
properties.description: Path segment for OperationClient (polling long-running operations, e.g. async image). Combined with the operation id.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.client.timeout
properties.description: HTTP client request timeout for shared client settings (unless overridden per chat, embedding, or image).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.client.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum retry attempts (Spring Retry and Reactor) for synchronous and streaming calls.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.client.retry.multiplier
properties.description: Exponential backoff multiplier between attempts.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.client.retry.min-backoff
properties.description: Initial backoff delay between attempts (milliseconds).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.client.retry.max-backoff
properties.description: Upper bound for backoff delay (milliseconds).

properties.name: spring.ai.auth.yandexai.api-key
properties.description: Yandex Cloud service account API key (header format as defined by ApiKeyAuthorizationProcessor).

properties.name: spring.ai.auth.yandexai.iam.token
properties.description: Static IAM token for Authorization: Bearer.

properties.name: spring.ai.auth.yandexai.iam.token-file
properties.description: File containing the IAM token; reloaded on refresh-interval (typical for Kubernetes / yc).

properties.name: spring.ai.auth.yandexai.iam.refresh-interval
properties.description: How often to reload the token from token-file.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.folder-id
properties.description: Yandex Cloud folder ID for chat only; falls back to spring.ai.model.folder-id when unset.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.completion-path
properties.description: HTTP POST path for completion relative to base-url (see Foundation Models API documentation).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.model
properties.description: Completion model enum value (maps to a URI like gpt://{folderId}/…).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.options.temperature
properties.description: Sampling temperature.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.options.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum response length in tokens (if supported by the selected model).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.chat.yandexai.options.reasoning-mode
properties.description: Model reasoning mode (see ReasoningMode).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.embedding.yandexai.folder-id
properties.description: Folder for embedding model URI; falls back to spring.ai.model.folder-id when unset.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.embedding.yandexai.embedding-path
properties.description: HTTP POST path for text embedding.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.embedding.yandexai.metadata-mode
properties.description: How document metadata is merged into text for embed(Document); required when using embeddings.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.embedding.yandexai.options.dimensions
properties.description: Embedding vector dimension (dim field in the API request body).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.folder-id
properties.description: Folder for image model URI; falls back to spring.ai.model.folder-id when unset.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.image-path
properties.description: HTTP POST path to start asynchronous image generation.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.options.mime-type
properties.description: Image response format (JPEG/PNG).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.options.seed
properties.description: Generation seed (if supported by the API).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.options.aspect-ratio.width
properties.description: Aspect ratio width (mapped to image options widthRatio).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.options.aspect-ratio.height
properties.description: Aspect ratio height (mapped to image options heightRatio).

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.operation.client.timeout
properties.description: Client timeout for image operations when nested operation.client is used.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.operation.client.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Retry settings for the image operation client.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.operation.client.retry.multiplier
properties.description: Backoff multiplier for the image operation client.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.operation.client.retry.min-backoff
properties.description: Minimum backoff delay (ms) for the operation client.

properties.name: spring.ai.model.image.yandexai.operation.client.retry.max-backoff
properties.description: Maximum backoff delay (ms) for the operation client.

values.description: Reasoning enabled; steps are not exposed to the user.
Metadata is not included when formatting document text for embedding.
Text preparation mode for embedding (see Spring AI 1.1.x MetadataMode javadoc).
Mode for inference-oriented scenarios (see Spring AI 1.1.x MetadataMode javadoc).
Full field set when formatting document content.
